summary: Add --min-tokens CLI flag to filter rate-limited failed runs before analysis
context: Full benchmark run had 45% of runs fail due to weekly usage limit, producing scores with totalTokens=0 that contaminated analysis. Needed a way to exclude these without modifying data files.
rationale: Filter at the CLI level before passing data to analyzers. Filters scores, transcripts, and session_data based on totalTokens threshold. Reports filtered count. Does not modify source data. Default 0 (no filtering) for backward compatibility.

alternatives.option: Filter in the loader instead of CLI
alternatives.reason_rejected: Loader should faithfully represent data on disk. Filtering is a user decision that belongs at the CLI/presentation layer.
